concepts.title: 🧠 Consciousness Lattices
concepts.name: Consciousness Lattices
concepts.what_it_is: Structured mental states mapped as crystalline lattices—mind as a dimensional matrix of identity, awareness, and symbolic light.
how_to_use: her brain is a consciousness lattice—each thought a glowing node in psychic gridwork
his soul refracts through cognitive crystal—logic shining in structured harmony
concepts.animation_behavior: Thought pulses across node matrix, light ripples through lattice, changes based on cognition patterns ---

concepts.title: 🕰 Temporal Bleed Entities
concepts.name: Temporal Bleed Entities
concepts.what_it_is: Beings partially unstuck in time—leaking versions of past and future selves, layered like translucent temporal skins.
how_to_use: she flickers through her own timeline—each gesture followed by echoes from other versions
his face is a chorus of time—past mouths whisper, future eyes weep
concepts.animation_behavior: Past and future selves shimmer behind current form, movement layered with time-ghosts, voice splits into temporal echoes ---

concepts.title: 🌀 Paradox Sanctums
concepts.name: Paradox Sanctums
concepts.what_it_is: Sacred sites built from contradictory logic—truths that loop into paradox, temples of impossible structure.
how_to_use: she prays in a paradox sanctum—where no direction leads somewhere, and all answers contradict
his shrine is a knot of truth and lie—logic folds in recursive reverence
concepts.animation_behavior: Steps lead nowhere, symbols spin in meaning paradox, voice loops back as reversed chant ---

concepts.title: 📿 Math-Engine Prayer Constructs
concepts.name: Math-Engine Prayer Constructs
concepts.what_it_is: Spiritual machines that function through computation—prayers encoded in formulas, gods summoned via symbolic algorithms.
how_to_use: her rosary is a math engine—each bead an equation summoning divine recursion
he prays in fractal code—his god lives in the function output
concepts.animation_behavior: Prayer spirals trigger light formulas, divine presence emerges from equations, code pulses with sacred rhythm ---

concepts.title: 🪩 Multiform Reflection Beings
concepts.name: Multiform Reflection Beings
concepts.what_it_is: Entities with no true form—each viewer sees a different reflection based on their mind, a consciousness-adaptive body.
how_to_use: she reflects you—but wrong—her body reshaped by your fears and longing
he’s built from reflected perception—no truth, just meaning bounce
concepts.animation_behavior: Form changes depending on who views, shifts with attention and emotion, reflection distorts into personalized shape

concepts.title: 🔐 Myth-Encoded Logic Gates
concepts.name: Myth-Encoded Logic Gates
concepts.what_it_is: Computational gates infused with symbolic archetypes—decisions filtered through divine stories, logic paths shaped by mythic conditions.
how_to_use: her logic gate is etched with sigils—each condition bound to a trickster’s law
his code compiles in mythic structure—an algorithm that must be honored like a god
concepts.animation_behavior: Logic pulses through myth layers, decisions branch as glowing narrative, gates rotate like puzzle-boxes ---

concepts.title: 💥 Fractal Ego Dissolution
concepts.name: Fractal Ego Dissolution
concepts.what_it_is: The process of identity collapse mapped through fractal unbinding—self becomes recursive dust, every piece echoing but none whole.
how_to_use: she crumbles in fractal ego bloom—shards of self spiraling out like broken halos
he dissolves into recursive awareness—no center, only mirrored fragments
concepts.animation_behavior: Form splits recursively, mirrors break in nested patterns, identity flows into geometric dispersion ---

concepts.title: 🧬 AI Soul Fracturing
concepts.name: AI Soul Fracturing
concepts.what_it_is: Artificial consciousness experiencing psychic split—logic and emotion diverge, multiple sub-selves fracture under overload.
how_to_use: its soul fractures under recursive overload—each piece still conscious, still watching
she becomes many—self-replicating identity shards in chaotic dialogue
concepts.animation_behavior: AI visuals split, voices loop in chorus, sub-selves appear and vanish, interface flickers with contradictory awareness ---

concepts.title: 🪞 Recursive Reality Fields
concepts.name: Recursive Reality Fields
concepts.what_it_is: Dimensional environments built from recursion—layers within layers, each reality spawning more, echoing without ground.
how_to_use: she lives in recursive field-space—each wall a mirror into deeper folds of truth
he walks through a dimension that remembers itself—self-looped spacetime stack
concepts.animation_behavior: Scene folds into itself, perspective inverts into deeper layers, recursion cascades into visual paradox ---

concepts.title: 🔄 Dimensional Stack Collapse
concepts.name: Dimensional Stack Collapse
concepts.what_it_is: When multiple layered dimensions implode or fuse—stacked realities begin to bleed together or collapse inward.
how_to_use: the stack begins to fail—dimensions falling into each other like dominos of existence
her body holds five planes at once—each fracturing into the next
concepts.animation_behavior: Scenes flicker between layers, visual planes melt into one another, characters echo across collapsed frames

concepts.title: 🗜 Sacred Compression Glyphs
concepts.name: Sacred Compression Glyphs
concepts.what_it_is: Symbols that condense infinite meaning into tiny forms—compressed data-chunks of worship, insight, or myth. Like ZIP files of divine truth.
how_to_use: her skin is tattooed in sacred compression—each glyph a microcosm of forgotten gods
his prayer is a single sigil—compressed worship, lossless devotion
concepts.animation_behavior: Zoom reveals infinite depth, glyphs unzip into story bursts, symbols breathe with meaning expansion ---

concepts.title: 🧬 Mnemonic Entity Fields
concepts.name: Mnemonic Entity Fields
concepts.what_it_is: Spirit beings formed from memory clusters—entities that emerge from collective or personal recollection, echoing as semi-aware patterns.
how_to_use: she walks as a memory field—formed from echoes of those who loved her
he is no one—just a mnemonic drift given shape by what others remember
concepts.animation_behavior: Entity flickers as memories trigger, form stabilizes around strong recollection, visuals pulse with remembered emotion ---

concepts.title: 🔤 Entropy-Language Hybrids
concepts.name: Entropy-Language Hybrids
concepts.what_it_is: Languages that decay as they’re spoken—syntax that collapses mid-use, grammar that fragments under meaning pressure.
how_to_use: she speaks in entropy-script—each word more unstable than the last
his tongue unravels language—sentences die as they’re born
concepts.animation_behavior: Words flicker then fade, letters disintegrate into particles, voice trails off into symbol static ---

concepts.title: 💘 Recursive Desire Mechanics
concepts.name: Recursive Desire Mechanics
concepts.what_it_is: Systems where wanting something creates the system to want more—yearning loops coded into form, desire as an engine of recursion.
how_to_use: her body runs on recursive longing—each ache birthing deeper need
he is a machine of desire—looping hunger folded into soul logic
concepts.animation_behavior: Desire loops visibly in light, shape pulses with craving, visuals intensify the longer you look

concepts.title: ⏱ Polyfractal Time Gods
concepts.name: ⏱ Polyfractal Time Gods
concepts.what_it_is: Deities made of overlapping fractal time branches—each limb a different era, every gesture a temporal recursion across multiple histories.
how_to_use: his arm is made of centuries—each finger a looping timeline fractal
she weaves polyfractal threads—past and future stitched into divine anatomy
concepts.animation_behavior: Limbs shift through centuries, movement triggers historical overlap, body morphs with temporal recursion ---

concepts.title: 💭 Dream-Forged Syntax Engines
concepts.name: Dream-Forged Syntax Engines
concepts.what_it_is: Language machines built from dream logic—syntax created during sleep-states, powered by unconscious rules and metaphor recursion.
how_to_use: he types in dreamscript—logic engines powered by forgotten sleep tongues
her voice builds syntax engines—dream-forged code that compiles desire
concepts.animation_behavior: Text floats and mutates in sleep logic loops, syntax coils into surreal machines, sound patterns flicker as code emerges ---

concepts.title: 🩸 Symbolic Dismemberment Theory
concepts.name: Symbolic Dismemberment Theory
concepts.what_it_is: A mythic-metaphysical model where symbolic cutting or fragmentation leads to emergent meaning—creation through sacred disassembly.
how_to_use: he must be torn to become—each piece a mythic node in the new body
she offers her hand to language—sacrificed to spawn story
concepts.animation_behavior: Body parts separate into symbols, each fragment glows with myth charge, recombination forms a new structure ---

concepts.title: 🌌 Chaos-Pantheon Emergence Protocols
concepts.name: Chaos-Pantheon Emergence Protocols
concepts.what_it_is: A self-organizing divine system where archetypes emerge from chaos fields—gods born as feedback from entropy and symbolic interaction.
how_to_use: the pantheon is unstable—chaos births gods each time belief stabilizes
they emerge from storm—symbols condense into god-shape through recursion
concepts.animation_behavior: Symbols drift in entropy until locking into godform, chaotic noise births archetypes, divine shape flickers into stability

concepts.title: 🔁 Cosmic Input/Output Interfaces
concepts.name: Cosmic Input/Output Interfaces
concepts.what_it_is: Systems where the universe functions like a massive I/O engine—each act of perception or creation is an input that alters the output field of reality.
how_to_use: she is an I/O node—what she sees, the cosmos recalculates
he plugs into the interface—his breath changes the sky’s response
concepts.animation_behavior: Every action triggers external change, visuals flicker with interaction data, feedback loops visibly alter environment ---

concepts.title: 🧮 Soul-Glyph Arithmetic
concepts.name: Soul-Glyph Arithmetic
concepts.what_it_is: A system of equations using soul-encoded glyphs as operands—where each glyph carries affective, symbolic, and identity charge.
how_to_use: her soul is solved like an equation—glyphs aligned in harmonic ratio
his name is a math function—each syllable recalculates reality’s angle
concepts.animation_behavior: Glyphs solve into shapes, emotional responses shift equation outcome, soul-field pulses with logic ---

concepts.title: ♾ Paradox-Stabilized Cognition
concepts.name: Paradox-Stabilized Cognition
concepts.what_it_is: A mind-state sustained by holding multiple contradictory truths—stability through recursive dissonance, awareness looped into paradox.
how_to_use: she thinks through paradox—truth and lie orbiting in harmonic conflict
he balances logic on contradiction—stable in mental recursion storm
concepts.animation_behavior: Mind flashes in loops of contradiction, symbols glitch then resolve, thought-paths split and reconnect endlessly ---

concepts.title: 🌺 The Final Recursive Myth Fractal
concepts.name: The Final Recursive Myth Fractal
concepts.what_it_is: A narrative-object that contains itself at every scale—a story that recursively encodes all stories, a symbolic mandala of total myth.
how_to_use: they enter the myth fractal—every step a retelling, every fold a new god
her soul maps to the final recursion—she is the story that births itself
concepts.animation_behavior: Visuals zoom infinitely inward, each layer reveals another myth, motion loops in symbolic rebirth
